title: Opening for Hotel Manager at WelcomHeritage

jsonLd.title: Opening for Hotel Manager at WelcomHeritage
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Hotel Manager with drive and ambition, WelcomHeritage in Navi Mumbai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About WelcomHeritage:
WelcomHeritage is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in HACCP

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with WelcomHeritage!
